name: Bulk Unzip GCS Files
description: Batch pipeline. Unzip password protected files on Cloud Storage to a specified location.

parameters.name: sourceDirectory
parameters.label: Source Directory
parameters.helpText: The source location Dataflow reads to. Ex: gs://your-bucket/zip_fils/

parameters.name: inputFilePattern
parameters.label: Input file(s) in Cloud Storage
parameters.helpText: The input file pattern Dataflow reads from. Ex: source/data_*.zip

parameters.name: outputDirectory
parameters.label: Output directory
parameters.helpText: The output location Dataflow writes to. Ex: gs://your-bucket/extract_fils/

parameters.name: secretPasswordVariable
parameters.label: gcp secret password variable
parameters.helpText: The input to read the password from secret manager

parameters.name: exceptionLocation
parameters.label: Exception file location (s) in Cloud Storage
parameters.helpText: Location where fail files are be moved. Ex: gs://your-bucket/exception

parameters.name: streamBufferSize
parameters.label: stream buffer size
parameters.helpText: The input to read the streaming data size, by default it is 1048576 i.e. 1MB
